blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 38".
